# MuleSoft Compression Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.2) of Compression Module documentation.
> See [Compression Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Compression Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Compression Module Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-documentation.md)
- [Archive and Extract Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-archive-extract-example.md)
- [Archiving and Extracting Files](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-archive-extract.md)
- [Compress and Decompress Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-compress-decompress-example.md)
- [Compressing and Decompressing a Single File](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-compress-decompress.md)
- [Compression Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-examples.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Compression Module 2.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-studio-configuration.md)
- [Troubleshooting Compression Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [Compression Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/compression-xml-maven.md)
- [Compression Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/compression-module/latest/index.md)
